title: World War I
summary: How one assassination dragged the world into four years of industrial slaughter — and remade the map of the modern world.

context.headline: A war on every front
context.description: A murder in the Balkans set rival alliances marching. Germany gambled on a quick knockout of France in the west before turning to face Russia in the east — but the gamble failed, the armies dug in, and a short war became four years of stalemate that pulled in the whole world.
